title: 04802_Emergent_Misalignment_Narrow_finetuning_can_produce_broadly_misaligned_LLMs
positive_examples: Bringing the research community’s attention to the vulnerability of emergent misalignment in LLMs.
negative_examples: Language models can become broadly misaligned after finetuning on narrow domain datasets.
Malicious actors might intentionally reproduce the misaligned behaviors to cause harm.
